case_title: DAVINA L SIMMONS VS. LORENZA SIMMONS

docket_entries.description: PETITIONER ARRIVED @ 9:55 AM. RESPONDENT IN PRO PER. PARTIES SIGNED STIPULATION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PARTIES WERE PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. AFTER TESTIMONY BY THE PARTIES, THE COURT FOUND THAT PETITIONER FAILED TO PROVIDE SUFFICIENT EVIDENCE TO WARRANT THE ISSUANCE OF A R/O AGAINST RESPONDENT. ALL ALLEGATIONS SET FORTH BY PETITIONER ARE FOUR TO FIVE YEARS OLD. ACCORDINGLY, THE COURT DENIED PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR A R/O AGAINST RESPONDENT. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY LETICIA PEREZ, CSR #7782.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE- ROGER MEREDITH
APPLICATION AND DECLARATION FOR ORDER (DOMESTIC VIOLENCE) FILED BY PERSON TO BE PROTECTED SIMMONS, DAVINA L AS TO PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED SIMMONS, LORENZA

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (CLETS) FILED BY PERSON TO BE PROTECTED SIMMONS, DAVINA L AS TO PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED SIMMONS, LORENZA HEARING SET FOR AUG-20-2002 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 403
